suggestions.k12Programs: What K-12 programs do you offer?
suggestions.bookAssessment: How do I book a free assessment?

responses.welcome: Hello! Welcome to GrowWise! 🎓 We're a leading educational platform serving Tri-Valley families with comprehensive K-12 academic programs and exciting STEAM courses. How can I help you today?
responses.courses: We offer comprehensive K-12 academic programs and exciting STEAM courses! Our K-12 programs include Math, ELA, Writing Lab, and SAT/ACT prep. For STEAM, we have Game Development, Python Programming, Young Founders, and ML/AI courses. Would you like to know more about any specific program?
responses.assessment: We offer FREE assessments and trial classes! 🎓 K-12 Programs: 60-minute FREE assessment. 🚀 STEAM Courses: 30-minute trial class. These help us create a personalized learning plan for your child. Would you like to book one?
responses.pricing: We offer competitive pricing for all our programs. For the most accurate pricing information, I'd recommend booking a free assessment where our team can provide detailed information based on your specific needs. Would you like to schedule a free assessment?
responses.contact: You can reach us through our website contact form, phone, or email. We're here to answer any questions about our programs and help you get started on your learning journey! Our team is responsive and will get back to you within 24 hours.
responses.fallback: That's a great question! I'd be happy to help you with that. GrowWise offers comprehensive K-12 academic programs and exciting STEAM courses. Could you provide a bit more detail about what specific information you're looking for?

guidance.prompt: Not sure which path to choose?

hero.title: About GrowWise
hero.subtitle: Since 2019, GrowWise has been transforming education in Dublin, CA, through personalized K-12 instruction and innovative STEAM programs. We empower every student with the skills, knowledge, and confidence they need to succeed.

foundation.title: Our Foundation
foundation.subtitle: Everything we do is guided by our core mission, vision, and values that put student success at the center.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Founded in 2019 in the heart of Dublin, California, GrowWise was born from a simple but powerful vision: every child deserves personalized education that meets them where they are and helps them reach their full potential.
story.p2: What started as a small tutoring center has grown into a comprehensive educational institution serving families throughout the Tri-Valley area. Our founder, Dr. Sarah Chen, recognized that traditional one-size-fits-all education wasn't serving the diverse learning needs of today's students.
story.p3: Today, GrowWise stands as a testament to what's possible when passionate educators combine proven teaching methods with innovative technology and genuine care for each student's success. We've helped over 300 students not just improve their grades, but develop confidence, curiosity, and a lifelong love of learning.

achievements.title: Our Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to student success and educational excellence.

approach.title: Our Educational Approach
approach.subtitle: We believe effective education requires more than delivering content. Our approach is built on four core principles that ensure every student receives the support they need to succeed.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Our passionate educators bring years of experience and genuine care for student success to every lesson.

community.title: Community Impact
community.subtitle: We believe in giving back to the community that supports us, creating opportunities for all students to succeed.

testimonials.title: Why Parents Love GrowWise
testimonials.subtitle: Personalized learning. Real growth. Measurable success — every student, every grade.

location.title: Visit Our Dublin Center
location.subtitle: Located in the heart of Dublin, CA, our modern facility provides the perfect environment for learning and growth.

cta.title: Enroll Today and Unlock Your Kid's Potential!

hero.title: Excel in English Arts
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive English Language Arts programs for students in Grades K–12. From reading enrichment to advanced writing, develop strong communication skills with expert instruction aligned to Dublin and Pleasanton school district standards.

cta.title: Ready to Excel in English?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of students who have transformed their writing and reading skills with GrowWise English programs.

hero.title: Master Mathematics with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive math programs for students in Grades K–12. From basic arithmetic to advanced calculus, develop strong mathematical thinking with expert instruction aligned to Dublin and Pleasanton school district standards.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose Our Math Programs?
whyChoose.subtitle: Comprehensive math education designed specifically for Tri-Valley students with curriculum alignments and proven teaching methodologies.

notSure.title: Not Sure Which Course is Right?
notSure.subtitle: Our education experts will assess your child's current level and recommend the perfect math program to accelerate their learning journey.

cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of students who have transformed their mathematical skills with GrowWise Math programs.

hero.subtext: 6–16 वर्ष के लिए खेल-मज़ेदार संरचित यात्रा—Scratch, Roblox, Minecraft और रोबोटिक्स।

reasons.roblox: 3D दुनिया और सिस्टम बनाने के लिए अगला कदम।
reasons.minecraft: मॉडिंग में गहराई चाहने वाले बिल्डर्स के लिए।
reasons.robotics: इंजीनियरिंग पसंद करने वालों के लिए हाथों-हाथ निर्माण।

enrollnow.h1: आज ही अपना नामांकन शुरू करें
enrollnow.metaDescription: अपने बच्चे का GrowWise की K-12 ट्यूशन और STEAM प्रोग्राम में नामांकन करें। शैक्षणिक और STEM विकल्प चुनें। फॉर्म भरें और हम 24 घंटों के भीतर मार्गदर्शन करेंगे।
